aiml.name: Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
aiml.about: The department of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning was established in the year of 2023 with an intake of 30 students in UG. The department is equipped with fully established laboratory such as Artificial Intelligence and Machine Laboratory.
aiml.vision: To achieve excellence in Artificial Intelligence and Machine learning education, cutting-edge research discoveries, and innovation in AI and ML for the betterment of society.
mission: To impart competencies and expertise’s in the field of artificial intelligence and machine learning.
To nurture a dynamic and collaborative research environment to push the boundaries of AI and ML
To foster entrepreneurship and innovation by intellectual advancements to address the real-world challenges and create economic prospects
peos: Conduct cutting edge research and develop solutions on problems of social relevance.
Work in a business environment, exhibiting team skills, work ethics, adaptability and lifelong learning
psos: Exhibit design and programming skills to build and automate business solutions using cutting edge technologies.
Strong theoretical foundation leading to excellence and excitement towards research, to provide elegant solutions to complex problems.

pos.title: Engineering knowledge
pos.description: Apply the knowledge of mathematics, science, engineering fundamentals, and an engineering specialization to the solution of complex engineering problems.

pos.title: Problem analysis
pos.description: Identify, formulate, review research literature, and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions using first principles of Mathematics, natural sciences, and engineering sciences.

pos.title: Design/development of solutions
pos.description: Design solutions for complex engineering problems and design system components or processes that meet the specified needs with appropriate consideration for the public health and safety, and the cultural, societal, and environmental considerations.

pos.title: Conduct investigations of complex problems
pos.description: Use research-based knowledge and research methods including design of experiments, analysis and interpretation of data, and synthesis of the information to provide valid conclusions.

pos.title: Modern tool usage
pos.description: Create, select, and apply appropriate techniques, resources, and modern engineering and IT tools including prediction and modeling to complex engineering activities with an understanding of the limitations.

pos.title: The engineer and society
pos.description: Apply reasoning informed by the contextual knowledge to assess societal, health, safety, legal and cultural issues and the consequent responsibilities relevant to the professional engineering practice.

pos.title: Environment and sustainability
pos.description: Understand the impact of the professional engineering solutions in societal and environmental contexts, and demonstrate the knowledge of, and need for sustainable development.

pos.title: Ethics
pos.description: Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics and responsibilities and norms of the engineering practice.

pos.title: Individual and team work
pos.description: Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse teams, and in multidisciplinary settings.

pos.title: Communication
pos.description: Communicate effectively on complex engineering activities with the engineering community and with society at large, such as, being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations, and give and receive clear instructions.

pos.title: Project management and finance
pos.description: Demonstrate knowledge and understanding of the engineering and management principles and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments.

pos.title: Life-long Learning
pos.description: Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability to engage in independent and life-long learning in the broadest context of technological change.

chemical.name: Chemical Engineering
chemical.about: The Department of Chemical Engineering was started in the year 1997. The Department has a sanctioned student intake of 40 for UG, affiliated to Anna University. Chemical Engineering is the branch of engineering that deals with the application of physical science (Physics and Chemistry) with mathematics, to the process of converting raw materials or chemicals into more useful or valuable forms. Majority of the passed out students are well placed in the country and many have completed higher studies in abroad and well placed there. Right from its inception, the Department has been doing its best to bring about excellence in academics. The Department has been aware of the role of chemical engineers in building of the modern India and has been taking appropriate steps to encourage research and developmental activities. The department has highly qualified core faculty of high professional profile to meet the emerging trends and challenges in the field of chemical engineering and allied areas on a global platform.
chemical.vision: To attain national recognition in training Engineers both professionally as well as morally for meeting the challenging needs of Chemical & allied industries and societal demands of ethical Engineers.
mission: Providing high quality Engineers in tune with changing needs of Chemical and allied industries.
Promoting industry academia relationship for mutual benefit and growth.
Cultivating a spirit of service and ethical conduct among students.
peos: PEO1: Pursue careers as successful professionals in Chemical Engineering and       related fields.
PEO2: Lifelong learning opportunities to improve and expand technical and          professional skills.
PEO3: Design and develop eco-friendly sustainable technologies with the aid of   computational skills.
PEO4: Develop personally and professionally by accepting professional and social             responsibilities and pursing leadership roles.
PEO5: Adhere to the highest level of professional code of ethics.
psos: PSO1  Graduates will have a strong foundation in engineering, science and current           Chemical Engineering practices and will have experience in solving structured        and unstructured problems  using conventional and innovative solutions.

PSO2  Graduates will be able to effectively describe the Chemical Engineering     problem, analyze the  data, develop potential solutions, evaluate these     solutions, and present the results using their oral, written and electronic             media skills.
PSO3  Graduates will have an understanding of ethical and professional    responsibilities of an engineer  and the impact of engineering solutions on     society and the global environment.

pos.description: PO1     Engineering knowledge: Apply the knowledge of mathematics,  science,  engineering fundamentals, and an engineering specialization to the solution       of  complex engineering problems

PO2     Problem analysis Problem analysis: Identify, formulate, review  research             literature, and analyze complex  engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions using first principles of  mathematics, natural sciences, and   engineering sciences.

PO4     Conduct investigations of complex problems: Use research-based    knowledge and research  methods including design of experiments,  analysis     and interpretation of data, and  synthesis of the information to provide valid    conclusions.

PO5     Modern tool usage: Modern tool usage Create, select, and apply    appropriate      techniques, resources, and  modern engineering and IT tools including    prediction and modeling to complex  engineering activities with an             understanding  of the limitations

PO6     The Engineer and Society: Apply reasoning informed by the contextual   knowledge to assess societal, health, safety,  legal and cultural issues and   the       consequent responsibilities relevant to the professional engineering      practice.

PO7     Environment and Sustainability: Understand the impact of the professional        engineering solutions in societal and  environmental contexts, and      demonstrate the knowledge of, and need for sustainable  development

civil.name: Civil Engineering
civil.about: The Department of Civil Engineering was established in the year of 1984 with an intake of 60 students in UG. In 2006 M.E-Construction Engineering and Management was started with an intake of 18 and the Research centre was approved by Anna University, Chennai in the year 2011. The Department is NBA accredited in the year 2004, 2009 and 2013. The department is equipped with fully established laboratories such as Soil Mechanics Laboratory, Environmental Engineering Laboratory, Survey Laboratory, CADD Lab, Fluid Mechanics and Machinery Laboratory, Concrete Laboratory Highway Laboratory and Strength of Materials Laboratory. The Association of Civil Engineers is regularly organizing seminars, Guest lectures and Industrial Visits for the benefit of student community. Our Department has been a member of reputed societies such Indian Concrete Institute (ICI), Indian Society for technical education (ISTE) etc.
civil.vision: To produce high class Civil Engineers who will work for the environmentally suitable for pollution free air, potable drinking water and comfortable accommodation so as to develop our motherland towards a modest standard of living at par with the developed nations.
mission: Inculcating quality consciousness among graduates by imparting world expertise.
Creating a sense of ethics and service for the benefit of society.
Making high class quality engineers to achieve International standards, to significantly contribute for the development of country.
peos: Gain knowledge and skills in Civil engineering which will enable them to have a career and professional accomplishment in the public or private sector organizations
Become consultants on complex real life Civil Engineering problems related to Infrastructure development especially housing, construction, water supply, sewerage, transport, spatial planning.

Become entrepreneurs and develop processes and technologies to meet desired infrastructure needs of society and formulate solutions that are technically sound, Economically feasible, and socially acceptable.
Perform investigation for solving Civil Engineering problems by conducting research using modern equipment and software tools.
Function in multi-disciplinary teams and advocate policies, systems, processes and equipment to support civil engineering
psos: Knowledge of Civil Engineering discipline Demonstrate in-depth knowledge of Civil Engineering discipline, with an ability to evaluate, analyze and synthesize existing and new knowledge.

Critical analysis of Civil Engineering problems and innovation Critically analyze complex Civil Engineering problems, apply independent judgment for synthesizing information and make innovative advances in a theoretical, practical and policy context.

Conceptualization and evaluation of engineering solutions to Civil Engineering Issues Conceptualize and solve Civil Engineering problems, evaluate potential solutions and arrive at technically feasible, economically viable and environmentally sound solutions with due consideration of health, safety, and socio cultural factors

mca.name: Computer Applications
mca.vision: To be the source of bringing out globally competent pioneering computing professionals, researchers, innovators and entrepreneurs and thereby succeed and contribute value to the knowledge-based economy and society.
mission: To offer high-grade, value-based Post-graduate programme in the field of Computer Applications
To provide conductive environment so as to achieve excellence in teaching-learning, and development activities.
To facilitate students to nurture skills to practice their professions competently to meet the ever-changing needs of society.
peos: Apply their computing skills to analyse, design and develop innovative software products to meet the industry needs and excel as software professionals.
Pursue lifelong learning and do research in the computing field based on solid technical foundations.
Communicate and function effectively in teams in multidisciplinary fields within the global, societal and environmental context.
Exhibit professional integrity, ethics and an understanding of responsibility to contribute technical solutions for the sustainable development of society.
psos: Able to select suitable data models, appropriate architecture, and platform to implement a system with good performance.
Able to design and integrate various system based components to provide user interactive solutions for various challenges.
Able to develop applications for real time environments using existing and upcoming technologies.

pos.description: PO 1 - Able to apply knowledge of computing, mathematics, science and engineering fundamentals appropriate to the discipline.
PO 2 - Able to analyse, design and investigate the real world complex problems to formulate solutions.
PO 3 - Able to learn current technologies to find the solutions for the real world problems.
PO 4 - Able to work effectively, individually and on teams, including diverse and multidisciplinary, to accomplish a common goal.
PO 5 - Able to communicate effectively and develop self-confidence
PO 6 - Able to recognize of the need and engage in continuing professional development
PO 7 - Able to understand of professional, ethical, legal, security and social issues and responsibilities.

cse.name: Computer Science Engineering
cse.about: Department of Computer Science and Engineering was established in the year 1993. It started undergraduate course with 30 students as intake of and now strengthens to 90. In addition, PG programme M.E. Computer Science and Engineering was started in the year 2009 with 18 students as intake. The department has been affiliated to Anna University Technology, Chennai. The alacrity of the students to learn makes it easier for the department of computer science and engineering to produce top-notch engineers who are being recruited by companies all over the world. We provide the following programmes.
cse.vision: To be a globally recognized leader in computer science and engineering education, research, and innovation, driving advancements that address societal challenges and shape the future of technology.
mission: Foster a culture of interdisciplinary collaboration, encouraging students and faculty to explore innovative solutions that integrate computer science and engineering with other domains such as medicine, business, and the humanities.
Conduct impactful research that advances the frontiers of computer science and engineering, addressing fundamental questions and tackling real-world problems with creativity and rigor.
Engage with industry, government, and other stakeholders to translate research discoveries into practical applications, driving economic growth and societal progress.
peos: Apply their technical competence in computer science to solve real world problems, with technical and people leadership.
Conduct cutting edge research and develop solutions on problems of social relevance.
Work in a business environment, exhibiting team skills, work ethics, adaptability and lifelong learning.
psos: Exhibit design and programming skills to build and automate business solutions using cutting edge technologies.
Strong theoretical foundation leading to excellence and excitement towards research, to provide elegant solutions to complex problems.
Ability to work effectively with various engineering fields as a team to design, build and develop system applications.

mech.name: Department of Mechanical Engineering
mech.vision: The Department of Mechanical Engineering of Adhiparasakthi Engineering College strives hard to produce globally competitive Mechanical Engineers with good attitude to serve the changing needs of the society.
mission: Imbibing the skill of innovative teaching and learning process to assure transfer of fundamental knowledge.
Continuous improvement in developing the competency among the students to succeed in solving the contemporary engineering challenges through value based education.
Developing the leadership skills through team work.
peos: Effectuating success in careers by exploring with the design, digital and computational analysis of engineering systems, experimentation and testing, smart manufacturing, technical services, and research.
Amalgamating effectively with stakeholders to update and improve their core competencies and abilities to ethically compete in the ever-changing multicultural global enterprise.
To encourage multi-disciplinary research and development to foster advanced technology, and to nurture innovation and entrepreneurship in order to compete successfully in the global economy.

To globally share and apply technical knowledge to create new opportunities that proactively advances our society through team efforts and to solve various challenging technical, environmental and societal problems.
To create world class mechanical engineers capable of practice engineering ethically with a solid vision to become great leaders in academia, industries and society
psos: Apply the knowledge gained in Mechanical Engineering for design and development and manufacture of engineering systems.
Apply the knowledge acquired to investigate research-oriented problems in mechanical engineering with due consideration for environmental and social impacts.
Use the engineering analysis and data management tools for effective management of multidisciplinary projects.

Environment and sustainability: Understand the impact of the professional engineering solutions in societal and environmental contexts, and demonstrate the knowledge of, and need for sustainable development.
Ethics: Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics and responsibilities and norms of the engineering practice.

it.name: Information Technology
it.vision: To train well educated skilled and disciplined IT Professionals through planned technological education to fit in the profession and to cater to the changing needs of the society through Innovation and Service.
mission: To impart high quality education by leveraging new technologies that help the socio-economic growth of the society
To inspire the students to develop innovative solutions that addresses the challenging demands of the modern computing world.
To inculcate strong ethical values and attitude to serve the mankind professionally and responsibly
peos: Demonstrate technical competence with analytical and critical thinking to understand and meet the diversified requirements of industry, academia and research.
Exhibit technical leadership, team skills and entrepreneurship skills to provide business solutions to real world problems.
Work in multi-disciplinary industries with social and environmental responsibility, work ethics and adaptability to address complex engineering and social problems.
Pursue lifelong learning, use cutting edge technologies and involve in applied research to design optimal solutions.
psos: To ensure graduates
Have proficiency in programming skills to design, develop and apply appropriate techniques, to solve complex engineering problems.
Have knowledge to build, automate and manage business solutions using cutting edge technologies.
Have excitement towards research in applied computer technologies.

pos.description: Engineering knowledge: Apply the knowledge of mathematics, science, engineering fundamentals, and an engineering specialization to the solution of complex engineering problems.

Problem analysis: Identify, formulate, review research literature, and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions using first principles of mathematics, natural sciences, and engineering sciences.

Design/development of solutions: Design solutions for complex engineering problems and design system components or processes that meet the specified needs with appropriate consideration for the public health and safety, and the cultural, societal, and environmental considerations.

Conduct investigations of complex problems: Use research-based knowledge and research methods including design of experiments, analysis and interpretation of data, and synthesis of the information to provide valid conclusions.

Modern tool usage: Create, select, and apply appropriate techniques, resources, and modern engineering and IT tools including prediction and modeling to complex engineering activities with an understanding of the limitations.

The engineer and society: Apply reasoning informed by the contextual knowledge to assess societal, health, safety, legal and cultural issues and the consequent responsibilities relevant to the professional engineering practice.

Environment and sustainability: Understand the impact of the professional engineering solutions in societal and environmental contexts, and demonstrate the knowledge of, and need for sustainable development.
Ethics: Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics and responsibilities and norms of the engineering practice.

pos.title: ndividual and team work
pos.description: Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse teams, and in multidisciplinary settings.

Communication: Communicate effectively on complex engineering activities with the engineering community and with society at large, such as, being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations, and give and receive clear instructions.

Project management and finance: Demonstrate knowledge and understanding of the engineering and management principles and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments.
Life-long learning: Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability to engage in independent and life-long learning in the broadest context of technological change.

labs: Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning Laboratory

eee.name: Electrical and Electronics Engineering
eee.about: The Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE) was established to prepare students for careers in power systems, electrical machines, control engineering, and electronics design, focusing on innovation and sustainable energy technologies.
eee.vision: To produce competent electrical engineers with high ethical values and technical capabilities to serve the society and industry through research and development.
mission: To provide high-quality education and training in electrical and electronics engineering.
To promote innovation, research, and collaborative projects with industry.
To instill moral and ethical values in students to handle professional challenges.
peos: Gain technical competence with analytical thinking to meet the requirements of electrical industry.
Exhibit leadership, teamwork, and entrepreneurship to solve real-world engineering issues.
Commit to lifelong learning and adaptive capability in modern power systems.
psos: Analyze, design, and implement electrical systems, power grids, and control systems.
Apply modern software and hardware tools for electrical automation and renewable energy integration.

ece.name: Electronics and Communication Engineering
ece.about: The Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) aims to provide cutting-edge education in communication networks, microelectronics, signal processing, embedded systems, and VLSI design.
ece.vision: To be a center of excellence in electronics and communication engineering education and research, creating innovators and entrepreneurs for global development.
mission: To deliver quality education through state-of-the-art laboratory infrastructure and teaching methodologies.
To foster research and development in wireless systems, VLSI, and signal processing.
To groom students with interpersonal skills, ethics, and professional excellence.
peos: Succeed in professional careers or higher education by applying knowledge of ECE.
Design, analyze, and develop electronics systems utilizing modern engineering tools.
Demonstrate communication, leadership, and ethical values in multi-disciplinary teams.
psos: Design and test electronic circuits, embedded systems, and communications devices.
Develop solutions for signal processing, VLSI design, and RF applications.

mba.name: Management Studies (MBA)
mba.about: The Department of Management Studies (MBA) provides professional business education that combines managerial theory with practical leadership skills, preparing students for dynamic corporate careers.
mba.vision: To be a premier business school that develops innovative and ethical business leaders with a global outlook.
mission: To deliver rigorous and contemporary management education.
To promote entrepreneurial thinking and leadership skills.
To cultivate social responsibility and ethical decision-making in future managers.
peos: Perform effectively in management roles in diverse business environments.
Develop entrepreneurial ventures or lead corporate strategy teams.
Adopt ethical business practices with consideration of social responsibility.
psos: Analyze business data and apply strategic managerial principles to solve complex problems.
Evaluate financial, marketing, operational, and human resource management strategies.

sh.name: Science & Humanities
sh.about: The Department of Science & Humanities bridges the transition of engineering aspirants into professional disciplines by imparting strong foundations in Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, and English Communication.
sh.vision: To lay a solid foundation in basic sciences and humanities, enabling engineering students to excel in their chosen technical fields with a holistic outlook.
mission: To deliver top-quality teaching in basic sciences and communication skills.
To nurture critical thinking and scientific inquiry.
To shape well-rounded, ethical professionals.
peos: Apply mathematical and scientific concepts to formulate and solve engineering problems.
Communicate technical concepts effectively with clarity and confidence.
Conduct basic scientific inquiry and experimental measurements.
psos: Solve fundamental engineering problems using mathematical modeling and scientific principles.
Communicate professionally in spoken and written formats.

csd.name: Computer Science & Design (CSD)
csd.about: The Department of Computer Science & Design (CSD) focuses on the intersection of computer science, computing technologies, and design-oriented applications like UI/UX, graphics, interactive systems, and game design.
csd.vision: To produce creative computing professionals equipped with deep technical knowledge and design excellence.
mission: To teach modern computing and design concepts.
To encourage project-based learning in interactive media, web technologies, and user experience.
To promote multidisciplinary collaborations and entrepreneurship.
peos: Succeed in computing and design industries as developers, UI/UX designers, or consultants.
Use modern computing design tools to build interactive technologies.
Work collaboratively with cross-functional teams to solve business challenges.
psos: Design and develop software applications with rich user experience and graphics.
Apply computing frameworks and design principles to build dynamic digital products.

agri.name: Agricultural Engineering
agri.about: The Department of Agricultural Engineering focuses on engineering applications in agriculture, including farm machinery, soil and water conservation, food processing technology, and sustainable farming systems.
agri.vision: To develop agricultural engineers who can address food security and agricultural sustainability challenges through engineering innovations.
mission: To impart skills in farm automation, irrigation, and post-harvest technology.
To conduct research for improving agricultural productivity and resource management.
To empower students to serve rural communities and agricultural industries.
peos: Achieve professional excellence in agricultural engineering or food processing fields.
Design eco-friendly and resource-efficient systems for agriculture.
Apply leadership and communication skills in solving community challenges.
psos: Apply engineering principles to soil, water, crop, machinery, and food systems.
Develop sustainable and automated systems for farm mechanization and post-harvest operations.
labs: Soil and Water Conservation Engineering Lab
Post-Harvest and Food Processing Technology Lab

phd-civil.name: PhD - Civil Engg.
phd-civil.about: The Ph.D. program in Civil Engineering offers opportunities for advanced research and academic inquiry in structural engineering, environmental engineering, geotechnical engineering, and construction management.
phd-civil.vision: To achieve international recognition in structural and environmental research, contributing to sustainable infrastructural development.
mission: To perform high-impact research addressing structural durability and environmental issues.
To foster collaborations with national and international research organizations.
To publish innovative findings in top-tier science and engineering journals.
peos: Formulate and solve complex engineering problems through research methodologies.
Contribute new knowledge to the civil engineering academic community.
Maintain high ethics and professional standards in research and development.
psos: Perform independent research in structural engineering, concrete technology, or environmental hydrology.
Publish scholarly articles in recognized peer-reviewed international journals.

phd-mech.name: PhD - Mechanical Engg.
phd-mech.about: The Ph.D. program in Mechanical Engineering provides research pathways in materials science, thermal engineering, fluid machinery, robotics, CAD/CAM, and advanced manufacturing systems.
phd-mech.vision: To drive innovations in mechanical sciences, robotics, and thermal engineering through rigorous scientific research and industrial partnership.
mission: To conduct cutting-edge research in manufacturing systems and materials engineering.
To mentor doctoral scholars to be research leaders in industry and academia.
To secure patents and commercialize innovative mechanical designs.
peos: Conduct independent research using advanced engineering simulation and modeling tools.
Communicate research breakthroughs effectively in academic and industrial settings.
Provide solutions for mechanical engineering challenges with global impact.
psos: Develop innovative systems in thermal sciences, energy conservation, or manufacturing automation.
Publish articles in leading SCI and Scopus-indexed mechanical engineering journals.

phd-ece.name: PhD - Electronics and Communication Engg.
phd-ece.about: The Ph.D. program in Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) aims to conduct cutting-edge research in wireless networks, microelectronics, VLSI systems, embedded design, and digital signal processing.
phd-ece.vision: To lead research in telecommunications and microelectronic systems, fostering innovation and technological development for the future.
mission: To carry out advanced research in communication systems, IoT architectures, and chip designs.
To produce highly skilled research professionals ready for technology hubs and universities.
To establish collaborative research laboratories with leading electronics enterprises.
peos: Create new algorithms, models, and architectures in communication networks.
Author scientific papers and publish them in international academic journals.
Demonstrate leadership in technological research and development projects.
psos: Design advanced VLSI systems, wireless networks, or embedded communication protocols.
Publish research in IEEE transactions, journals, and prestigious international symposia.

phd-eee.name: PhD - Electrical and Electronics Engg.
phd-eee.about: The Ph.D. program in Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE) focuses on power electronics, electrical machinery designs, smart grid architectures, renewable energy integration, and control instrumentation systems.
phd-eee.vision: To be a premier center for electrical engineering research, addressing power management and clean energy challenges globally.
mission: To conduct research in power systems, electric vehicles, and clean energy storage.
To guide research scholars in solving industrial power and grid integration problems.
To bridge academic research and practical power grid applications.
peos: Develop innovative control models and topologies for smart power transmission.
Publish high-quality research papers and file technical patents.
Engage in ethical research practices that benefit society and environment.
psos: Model, simulate, and design advanced power converters, smart grids, or industrial drives.
Contribute scholarly findings to indexed journals and conferences in electrical engineering.
labs: Smart Grids & Renewable Energy Simulation Center

aids.name: Artificial Intelligence and Data Science
aids.about: The Department of Artificial Intelligence and Data Science (AI & DS) aims to provide a strong foundation in data engineering, machine learning pipelines, predictive modeling, statistical learning, and database architectures.
aids.vision: To produce globally competent professionals in AI and Data Science who contribute to societal growth through innovative research and ethical application of intelligence systems.
mission: To deliver deep education in mathematical foundations, machine learning algorithms, and modern data infrastructures.
To cultivate collaboration with top data companies for industrial training and project opportunities.
To foster academic research and intellectual curiosity in analytics and cognitive engineering.
peos: Apply analytical models and programming paradigms to build secure data-driven software solutions.
Demonstrate career progression in global tech enterprises or pursue entrepreneurial research ventures.
Practice engineering with moral responsibility, high team spirit, and continuous skill refinement.
psos: Design and optimize neural networks, big data analytical dashboards, and intelligent predictive algorithms.
Integrate cloud computing platforms and secure architectures to deploy automated machine learning models.
